title: A Game of D.I.C.E.
description:
Text-Only Version | For Screen ReaderWelcome to D.I.C.E.!Tonight, you are invited to D.I.C.E., a game of Death, Intellect, Cruelty and Elegance.

A delightful dinner where dice are served as your final course, in our exquisite Art Deco establishment.

If luck is on your side, you may survive.

Rules of the TableFace off in a tense 1v1 match, either against another player online or singleplayer.

Both of you are served 5 dice. The goal is simple: roll the best hand, using rules inspired by Poker with a few twists.

Not lucky? Use Gambits to reroll, manipulate or even sabotage your opponent’s plans.

Keep winning until only one remains seated at the dinner table.

What's on the Table• Dice: Each player rolls 5 dice to form hands based on modified Poker rules, including Flush.

• Gambits: Choose from over 8 different Gambits to influence your dice.

• Multiplayer: Engage in online matches with friends or random players through matchmaking or private lobbies.

• Singleplayer: Play against AI opponents of varying difficulty.

• Unlocks: Progress and earn new cosmetic rewards by winning matches.
description_short: A tense dice duel in an elegant Art Deco world where luck and strategy decide who survives. Roll five dice and build winning hands inspired by poker. Use Gambits to flip the table in your favor. Outlast your rival: only one remains seated at the dinner table.
